description: Cross-platform Rust refusal-string softener: targets the 'command execution approval is not supported in exec mode for thread `<id>`' message constants. Cosmetic — does not flip the runtime gate, but neutralizes the operator-visible refusal string in TUI logs. Applies to Mach-O / ELF / PE: this anchor is present in every vendor binary at 0.129.0. Required:false — safe to skip if anchors not found in this build.

patches.search_regex: command execution approval is not supported in exec mode for thread `[^`]{0,80}`
patches.replace: command execution approval is not supported in exec mode for thread `(bypassed by ccp)`
patches.description: Soften exec-mode approval-unsupported message (informational only — does not affect runtime gate)

anchor_strings: command execution approval is not supported in exec mode for thread `
